title: Image To Image Needle Felted Wool Miniature Transform
sourceTitle: Image To Image Needle Felted Wool Miniature Transform AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Image-to-image handcrafted needle-felted wool miniature transformation using uploaded subject reference before needle-felted wool miniature transformation, preserving same subject from the source image as a charming soft-fiber collectible. Subject: same subject from the source image keeps the recognizable source pose and silhouette while becoming a wool miniature with slightly oversized head, simplified limbs, soft fuzzy surface, tiny black bead eyes or felted circles, and miniature felted outfit details. Scene: clean tabletop craft studio with felting needles, wool roving, and scale cues frames the miniature as a macro craft-studio product photo with clean neutral bokeh, visible scale cues, and warm handmade atmosphere. Composition: same recognizable pose and silhouette as the reference, simplified into handmade proportions in a close-up macro frame with shallow depth of field, source colors retained but softened through organic roving wool, accessories recreated as miniature felted props. Signature Elements: Preserved image to image needle felted wool miniature transform source structure, fixed composition hierarchy, stable visual rhythm, and reusable content controls remain consistent across generated variants. Style: Photorealistic needle-felted wool texture, visible needle-punch fibers, handcrafted seams, tiny fabric buttons, stitched details, Pixar-like charm, high fidelity 8K macro photography. Color Palette: Original source colors softened into warm wool tones, neutral craft-studio background, black bead-eye accents, gentle fabric-button highlights, and soft handmade color transitions. Lighting: Soft studio lighting with warm highlights, gentle shadows, shallow f/2.8 depth of field, and clean bokeh separation around the miniature. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Image-to-image handcrafted needle-felted wool miniature transformation using provided character photo before wool collectible conversion, preserving same outfit, accessories, and body silhouette from the provided image as a charming soft-fiber collectible. Scene: neutral craft workbench with soft bokeh, wool scraps, tiny buttons, and warm studio highlights frames the miniature as a macro craft-studio product photo with clean neutral bokeh, visible scale cues, and warm handmade atmosphere. Composition: standing miniature pose matching the original stance with simplified felt limbs in a close-up macro frame with shallow depth of field, source colors retained but softened through organic roving wool, accessories recreated as miniature felted props. Lighting: Soft studio lighting with warm highlights, gentle shadows, shallow f/2.8 depth of field, and clean bokeh separation around the miniature.
